title: fraxinus excelsior f. aurea
intro: Fraxinus excelsior f. aurea, also known as the golden ash tree, is a variant of the common ash tree (Fraxinus excelsior) that is characterized by its golden-yellow foliage. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Fraxinus excelsior f. aurea include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use is not well-documented and more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
